title: aira stricta
intro: Aira stricta, also known as Wood Meadow-grass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and combat infections. The health benefits of Aira stricta include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and support respiratory health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
